$comment: c12 D-CSUBSET-UNARY-PLUS: the unary `+` operator (C 6.5.3.3) — identity, applying integer promotion. Added `+` to the prefix-operator list + a `PlusOp -> Pos` unaryOps row; CST->HIR lowers `+x` to its OPERAND directly (no HIR op). RED-ON-DISABLE: drop `+` from the prefix list and `int x=+1;` fails to parse (P0009 at the `+`). The pe arm RUNS on the windows leg; elf/macho/arm64 on the linux/darwin/qemu legs; the release arm witnesses the optimizer over the identity fold.
